programs.title: Too Cute!
programs.desc: Bulldog Dexter is out to prove himself as athletic and not lazy like his siblings; litter of pups from the city are rescued and brought to a barn where they encounter strange beasts.

programs.title: Too Cute!
programs.desc: Cairn terrier Doogie wants picky house cat to be his friend; Samoyed pups choose between staying squeaky clean with their mother or getting down and dirty with their father.

programs.title: Too Cute!
programs.desc: Dot the English mastiff puppy tries to ditch her sister, Olive, who follows her everywhere; Niles the small Munsterlander wants to be the best hunting dog there is, but he's easily distracted by his mother.

programs.title: Too Cute!
programs.desc: Chester the Siamese desperately searches for peace and quiet away from his eight loud siblings; Pippa works at a cat clinic while simultaneously caring for six tiny British Shorthairs.

programs.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programs.desc: An anxious Robert looks on when Indah the Komodo Dragon meets Gili, an aggressive potential mating partner; Terri handles a lump inside Jessie the woma python.

programs.title: Gator Boys
programs.desc: Paul and Jimmy argue over Jimmy's goal to expand the Gator Boys Rescue Operation; Jimmy disappears; Paul tries to keep the Gator Boys from falling apart.
